languages.text: "Варп вас побери, капитан! Вы солдат? Так исполняйте приказ!"
"Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"
languages.original_text: "Варп вас побери, капитан! Вы солдат? Так исполняйте приказ!"

traits.locale_text: "Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"
"Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"
"Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"

languages.text: 「ふざけんなよ、艦長！兵士なら俺の命令に従え！」
languages.original_text: "Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"

traits.locale_text: 「ワープで連れて行くぞ、艦長！兵士なら俺の命令に従え！」

languages.text: "Seni Öteboyut alsın Yüzbaşı! Asker misin sen? O hâlde emirlerime uy!"
languages.original_text: "Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"

traits.locale_text: "Seni Öteboyut alsın Yüzbaşı! Asker misin sen? O hâlde emirlerime uy!"

languages.text: «¡Que la disformidad se la lleve, capitana! ¿Es una soldado o no? ¡Pues cumpla mis órdenes!».
languages.original_text: "Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Que la disformidad se la lleve, capitana! ¿Es una soldado o no? ¡Pues cumpla mis órdenes!».

languages.text: “亚空间的！你还是个军人吗，上尉？是的话就服从我的命令！”
languages.original_text: "Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"

traits.locale_text: “亚空间的！你还是个军人吗，上尉？是的话就服从我的命令！”

languages.text: « Par le Trône, capitaine ! Vous êtes un soldat et je vous ai donné un ordre ! »
languages.original_text: "Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"

traits.locale_text: « Par le Trône, capitaine ! Vous êtes un soldat et je vous ai donné un ordre ! »

languages.text: "Der Warp soll Euch holen, Captain! Seid Ihr eine Soldatin? Dann befolgt meine Befehle!"
languages.original_text: "Warp take you, Captain! Are you a soldier? Then follow my orders!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Warp soll Euch holen, Captain! Seid Ihr eine Soldatin? Dann befolgt meine Befehle!"
